change_made: Reduced retry params: MAX_RETRIES 5->3, BASE_ITERATIONS 10000->50, added per-net 10s and total 60s time caps, disabled adaptive budget for retries with max_iterations_cap=5000

Removed redundant per-layer loop in can_place_via: replaced for layer in range(10) query_tracks_near with single unfiltered query, since vias are through-hole and must check clearance on all layers. Reduced query_tracks_near calls from 3.2M to 942K.

Reduced retry pathfinder iteration limits from 5000 to 1000 (max_iterations, max_iterations_cap, min_iterations) to prevent clearance-blocked nets from wasting time on futile searches. GATE nets need only ~400 iters, so 1000 is sufficient.
